findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B missing — 24 days overdue, no active sprint exists
findings.detail: SPRINT-2026-05-A ended incomplete 2026-05-20. Reconciliation on 2026-05-21 committed to SPRINT-2026-05-B. As of 2026-06-14 (24 days later), no SPRINT-2026-05-B file exists. STATUS.md and ROADMAP.md both flag this as a hard blocker. Without an active sprint, IFleet has no work queue and Factory's coordination value is zero. Requires human action from Sebastian + Esme. Cannot be auto-created without fabricating scope.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian + Esme author SPRINT-2026-05-B with realistic scope based on actual capacity and Esme's Retell R1 outcome. This audit run updates STATUS.md to reflect day 24 overdue.

findings.title: Retell R1 research 25 days overdue — Esme confirmation still pending
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Q3 open question Q3 has an ACTION REQUIRED note: Esme's Retell R1 confirmation is 25 days overdue as of 2026-06-14. ADR-0011 retains Retell as default pending confirmation but all voice-discovery work (M-005+) depends on this decision. No sprint exists to schedule the research. Requires Esme to file findings or confirm Retell via new ADR superseding ADR-0011.
findings.fix_sketch: Esme files R1 research findings as a new ADR (0012+) OR explicitly confirms Retell per ADR-0011. This audit updates the day-count note in ROADMAP.md.

findings.title: Q3 2026 OKRs not defined — Q3 starts 2026-07-01, all Q2 OKRs confirmed MISSED
findings.detail: KPI.md contains only Q2 2026 OKRs, all four of which are confirmed MISSED. Q3 2026 begins 2026-07-01 (17 days from today) with no OKR targets defined. Without Q3 OKRs, the self-healing system has no KPI anchors for threshold calibration and Sebastian/Esme have no success criteria for the next sprint. Requires human action to define Q3 objectives and key results.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian defines Q3 2026 OKRs in KPI.md. Minimum viable: one Objective + at least 2 Key Results with numeric targets and due dates. Must happen before SPRINT-2026-05-B opens to give workers success criteria.

findings.title: README.md footer 'Last updated: 2026-05-26' — stale by 19 days, does not reflect audit history
findings.detail: README.md footer still shows 'Last updated: 2026-05-26', unchanged through five subsequent nightly audit cycles. While README content (IFleet status table, structure description) remains accurate, the stale footer misleads agents about when the file was last verified. The IFleet row still says 'Exists (launched 2026-05-19, PR #117)' which is correct, but the 2026-05-26 date implies no verification since then.

findings.title: STATUS.md 'In flight' not updated for 2026-06-14 audit session
findings.detail: STATUS.md 'In flight' section references 'day 20 overdue' for SPRINT-2026-05-B (correct as of 2026-06-10 when last updated) but is now 4 days stale. Footer shows 'Last updated: 2026-06-10'. The nightly audit must update this to reflect today's session state.
findings.fix_sketch: Update STATUS.md: add 2026-06-14 audit session to Done, update In flight SPRINT-B note to day 24 overdue, update footer.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] missing entry for 2026-06-14 nightly audit
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] was last updated 2026-06-10. The nightly audit convention (established 2026-05-26) adds a Changed entry per audit run. This ensures the release log reflects audit activity even when no spec content changes occur.
findings.fix_sketch: Add 2026-06-14 audit Changed entry to [Unreleased] in CHANGELOG.md.

findings.title: costs.json sessions array has been empty since repo creation — no audit sessions tracked
findings.detail: costs.json sessions[] has never had an entry appended despite multiple audit sessions running since 2026-05-21. The _notes say 'Append one entry per Claude/Codex session'. Not tracking audit session costs makes the cost-per-task analysis impossible and violates the file's own contract. NOTE: nightly audits run in the factory repo context; cost data should be appended for each audit session.
findings.fix_sketch: Append a session entry for this audit run. Future audits should append their session cost on completion. If cost data is unavailable from the runner, append a zero-cost placeholder with task_summary set to 'nightly-audit'.
